description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust, dark metallic head and a straight, polished wooden handle. The head has a flat striking face on one side for driving nails and a curved claw on the opposite side for prying and removing nails. The handle is made of smooth, varnished wood with visible grain patterns and a rectangular cross-section, providing a comfortable grip. A colored label or logo is affixed to the upper part of the handle, adding a touch of branding. The hammer appears well-crafted, with no visible signs of wear, damage, or rust. Its design is utilitarian and suitable for a variety of construction or repair tasks in urban environments.
description: A traditional claw hammer with a dark metal head and a smooth, straight wooden handle, featuring a visible label. The hammer is clean and well-crafted, ideal for driving and removing nails.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the hammer, including the flat striking surface, curved claw, and a visible label on the handle.
description_view_1: Side profile showing the narrow edge of the hammer, highlighting the thickness of the head and handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hammer head and handle, with the claw's curve clearly visible and no label present.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the hammer's thickness and the alignment of the head and handle.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle with a rectangular cross-section, smooth finish, and visible wood grain
attribute_head_type: claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal, made of dark steel
attribute_brand_or_logo: visible label with text and logo on the handle
